summary: Broad draft PR improving split-up matching/source shape across Dolphin/SysDolphin and many Melee subsystems. The PR body reports 26 new matches, 79 unmatched-item improvements, matched code +11944 bytes, matched data +448 bytes, and zero broken/fuzzy/metric regressions after local checks. The PR was closed unmerged and explicitly superseded by directory-split draft PRs #2619-#2630 and #2632.

key_files.role: Changed Dolphin THP decoder source; diff shows replacing raw THPFileInfo offset access with typed MCU buffer view casts and reuse of local info pointer.
Changed camera matching/source shape; diff shows local declaration ordering, expression splitting, assert expansion, and PAD_STACK adjustment.
Changed common fighter source; diff shows direct field access, helper reuse, and replacement of M2C_FIELD with typed struct field access.
Changed common fighter attack source; diff shows declaration/lifetime changes, extern float use, semantic type ftCo_LinkCatchAttrs, and direct item access through fighter vars.
Changed fighter damage ice initialization; diff expands JObjRotMtx inline into explicit quaternion/rotation matrix operations.
Changed fighter down-bound effect spawn call; diff removes temporary JObj local and passes field expression directly with PAD_STACK retained.
Changed guard source; diff shows GET_FIGHTER use and PAD_STACK tuning.
Changed Kirby/Yoshi egg source; diff shows local pointer to co_attrs.xBC and PAD_STACK use.
Changed Nana init source; diff shows narrow local alias introduced around ftCommon_8007D5D4 call.
Changed fighter collision source; diff shows call argument order change, declaration order change, and float-zero comparison rewritten as negation.
Changed fighter material data/source; diff adds static HSD_TevDesc and HSD_TECnst data before force_active region.
Changed game-mode source; diff shows direct gmMainLib field access, ternary bool return, and replacing manual unlock search with helper call.
Largest changed file by metadata; PR report lists new matches for Exception_ReportCodeline and Exception_ReportStackTrace and .data improvement.
Large stage-source change; PR report lists grIceMt_801F686C and .sdata reaching 100%.
Menu count source changed; PR report lists mnCount_8025092C as an unmatched-item improvement.
Menu item-switch source/data changed; PR report lists .sdata new match plus .data and function improvements.
Game-mode source changed; PR report lists one new match and multiple function improvements.
Stage source changed; PR report lists grMuteCity_801F1A34 and grMuteCity_801F290C improvements.
Item source/data changed; PR report lists .sdata2 new match and function improvements.
Video/source changed; PR report lists un_8031E444_OnEnter improvement.
Additional changed files span gm, gr, if, it, lb, mn, mp, pl, ty, and sysdolphin. Complete file list is in changed_files evidence.

what_changed: Changed 67 files with 941 additions and 757 deletions according to PR metadata.
PR body reports broad split-up matching/source-shape work across stage, item, fighter, menu, game-mode, and SysDolphin units.
PR body reports 26 new matches and 79 improvements in unmatched items for GALE01 after rebase from base 07bb71f to head b6cc733.
Changed files include external Dolphin THP decoder code, SysDolphin baselib files, and many src/melee subsystems.
Issue comments state the PR was superseded by directory split drafts #2619 through #2630 plus #2632, and that docs/standards.md was removed from the upstream PR branch.
smart_moves: The author reported a fresh baseline build and a clean temp-worktree regression gate before presenting the broad matching PR.
The author later split the broad PR by directory, reducing review surface for subsystem-specific changes.

The diff excerpt shows several generated-looking or raw-access forms replaced with project fields/helpers where evidence in the code already existed, such as Fighter_804D64FC->x20 instead of M2C_FIELD and ftCo_800A1AB4 instead of repeated distance math.
The THP decoder excerpt avoids repeated direct __THPInfo access by keeping a local info pointer and uses a typed MCU buffer view instead of raw byte-offset pointer arithmetic.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For split-up cleanup PRs, broad multi-directory progress can be validated locally, but reviewability may still require regrouping into smaller directory-scoped PRs.

When a known typed view exists for a raw offset, using the typed view can improve source shape while preserving matching intent; this PR's THP excerpt changes a raw ((u8*) info + 0x10) mcuBuffer access into THPFileInfoMCUBufferView casts.

Replacing repeated local math with an existing helper can reduce generated-looking code when the helper's role is already established locally; this PR replaces explicit dx/dy/sqrt distance checks with ftCo_800A1AB4 in ftCo_800AF290.
Data additions can be part of a matching PR when reported as data matches, but they should remain tied to explicit match/report evidence because static data ownership is high-risk.

naming_conventions.convention: Prefer already-established typed names over anonymous or misleading generated struct names when a recovered type exists; the diff changes struct ftLk_DatAttrs* attrs to ftCo_LinkCatchAttrs* attrs.
Use short local role names for clear pointer aliases only when they clarify access or codegen, as shown by xBCp for &fp->co_attrs.xBC in ftkirbyyoshiegg.c.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration order and temporary lifetime tuning: camera.c, ftCo_Attack100.c, ftCo_DamageIce.c, and ftcoll.c move declarations or introduce locals to affect source shape.
PAD_STACK tuning appears in several excerpts, including Camera_80030CFC, ftCo_Guard, ftCo_DownBound, and ftkirbyyoshiegg.c.
Typed field recovery: replace raw pointer/M2C_FIELD access with typed struct fields where available, e.g. THPFileInfoMCUBufferView and Fighter_804D64FC->x20.
Control-flow/expression shaping: gm_80164330 uses a ternary bool return, and camera.c splits a larger pitch_angle expression through temp_f31.

Assert shape was changed from HSD_ASSERTMSG macros to explicit __assert calls in the camera excerpt; this is matching evidence for this PR but conflicts with the general cleanup preference unless verifier evidence justifies it.

Function/helper inlining tradeoff appears both directions: ftCo_800AB224 replaces a repeated command sequence with ftCo_800AD54C_inline0, while ftCo_DamageIce_Init expands JObjRotMtx into explicit rotation/quaternion steps.

review_feedback.feedback: No review comments or reviews are present in the loaded metadata. Author/bot comments state the PR was superseded by directory split draft PRs.
The author states docs/standards.md was removed from the upstream PR branch and kept as a local PR-workflow reference outside the upstream Melee PR surface.

follow_up_queries: PR #2632 Dolphin support split THPDec particle sysdolphin
PR #2620 FT split ftCo_0A01 ftCo_Attack100 ftCo_DamageIce ftmaterial
PR #2621 GM split gm_1601 gm_18A5 gm_1A4C gmtou
PR #2622 GR split gricemt grmutecity grbigblue grvenom
PR #2626 MN split mncount mnitemsw mnnamenew
ftMaterial static HSD_TevDesc HSD_TECnst data match

notes: Changed-file metadata and PR body are complete enough to preserve PR identity, file list, scope, reported verification, and supersession status.
The loaded diff excerpt is truncated, so file-specific code observations are limited to shown excerpts and should not be generalized to all 67 files.
The PR was closed with merged_at null and was superseded by split drafts, so this intake should not treat the broad PR as accepted upstream work.
There are no loaded review comments or reviews; review feedback is limited to issue comments and PR/body report text.
Verification claims are from PR body and bot report text; this intake did not rerun builds or objdiff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Broad matching PRs may need directory-split follow-up even when local reports are clean
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2617 reported 26 new matches, 79 improvements, and zero regressions, but was closed unmerged and superseded by directory-split drafts. Curators may preserve this as a workflow lesson about review surface, not as evidence that every individual source change was accepted.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed access can replace raw offset/M2C_FIELD access when the local type view is known
accepted_candidate_records.text: The excerpted THP and fighter changes replace raw offset or M2C_FIELD-style access with THPFileInfoMCUBufferView and Fighter_804D64FC->x20 field access. This supports the existing typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard for the shown cases.

source_update_candidates.title: Keep PR workflow checklist outside upstream Melee PR surface
source_update_candidates.text: Issue comment states docs/standards.md was removed from the upstream PR branch and the checklist was kept as a local PR-workflow reference under .codex/skills/melee-pr-workflow/references/. Curator may decide whether workflow-source documentation should record this placement rule.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a workflow/source-corpus placement note, not a decomp code standard proven by the PR diff.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the broad PR's code changes as merged or accepted upstream; metadata shows merged_at null and issue comments say superseded.
Do not infer reviewer intent because there are no loaded reviews or review comments.
Do not turn the explicit __assert changes in camera.c into a global preference; the loaded standards prefer assert/report macros unless matching evidence requires otherwise.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK or declaration-order churn as normal style; the standards require narrow verifier evidence, and this intake only has PR-reported verification, not fresh objdiff runs.
